name: node-errno
title: node-errno
summary: libuv errno details exposed - Node.js module
description:
libuv errno details exposed - Node.js module
errno is a Node.js module which exposes more details of libuv errors.
.
When you need more details about Node.js errors, errno provides the mappings
directly from libuv so you can use them in your code.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-errno because libuv errno details exposed - Node.js module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-errno as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-errno with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-errno --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
